releaseNotes: Fix: some multichannel (5.1/7.1) movies and shows failed to play at all on certain devices - audio now downmixes to stereo when a device can't create a surround AudioTrack, instead of crashing playback outright. Fix: the Play button on Movie/TV Show detail pages didn't have D-pad focus when the page first opened, so the first remote press could silently do nothing or go back instead of playing. Fix: My List's Movies/TV Shows favorites could take several seconds to appear because of an inefficient database query - now queried directly instead of loading the whole catalog. Fix: the Trailer button's Silk/YouTube picker could take 2-3 attempts to select on Fire TV - it now launches YouTube directly when installed.
